zh.Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, UK: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾文斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliane Brun於1185年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾費林格達萊斯時，她的父親Roger Brun24歲，母親Lady Isabell Le Bruen19歲。她於大約1213年與Henry le Scrope在英國英格蘭越可爾費林格達萊斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1223年在英國越可爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾文斯利。

zh-hans.Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, UK: 英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾文斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliane Brun于1185年出生在英国英格兰越可爾費林格達萊斯时，她的父亲Roger Brun24岁，母亲Lady Isabell Le Bruen19岁。她于大约1213年与Henry le Scrope在英国英格兰越可爾費林格達萊斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1223年在英国越可爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾文斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Brun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Patrice, Philippe, Pierre, Thierry, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Michael, Jean-Marc, Lorette, Lucien.

French, Catalan, and Scandinavian; North German (also Brün): nickname from French and Catalan brun, Middle Low German brūn ‘brown’, referring to the color of the hair, complexion, or clothing. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare French Lebrun and German Bruen .
North German, Scandinavian, and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Brun(o), from brūna ‘brown’. See also Braun .

variants.name: Brunell
meanings: English (Lancashire): nickname denoting someone with a brownish complexion, from Middle English burnel, a metathesized form of Old French brunel, a diminutive of Old French brun ‘brown’; used also as a personal name.
Swedish: ornamental name from brun ‘brown’ + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.
German (also Brünell): nickname meaning ‘brown’ (see Brun ).

variants.name: Breunig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Florian, Franz, Math, Siegfried, Winfried.
German: from the old personal name Brūning, a derivative of Brun(o) (see Brun ), which was diphthongized (via Brüning; see Bruning 2) to Breuni(n)g in the 17th century.

variants.name: Brauning
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gernot, Gunther, Helmut.
South German (Bräuning): patronymic from the ancient Germanic personal name Brun(o) (see Brun ).

variants.name: Bruneau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Patrice, Alcide, Amie, Andre, Arianne, Armand, Cecile, Emile, Jean-Claude, Lucien, Napoleon.
French: diminutive of   Brun   ‘brown’. Compare   Bronaugh  .

History: Pierre-Guillaume Bruneau dit Pelletier, from Poitiers, married Marie-Élisabeth Morin in Quebec City, QC, in 1758. Joseph Petit dit Bruneau from Paris, France, married Marie Chenay in Quebec City, QC, in 1675. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Breun
meanings: German: from a pet form of the personal name Bruno, see Brun .

variants.name: Bruner
meanings: German: nickname from Old High German, Old Saxon Brūn (see Brun ).
German and Jewish: variant of   Brunner  .

variants.name: Bruhn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Bernd, Bernhard, Dieter, Kurt, Gerhard, Heinz, Johann, Wolfgang.
North German (also Brühn), Danish, and Swedish: variant of Brun .

variants.name: Braun
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Ernst, Otto, Alois, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Heinz, Joerg, Wolfgang, Egon.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from German braun ‘brown’ (Middle High German brūn), referring to the color of the hair, complexion, or clothing.

German: from the personal name Bruno, which was borne by the Dukes of Saxony, among others, from the 10th century or before. It was also the name of several medieval German and Italian saints, including Saint Bruno, the founder of the Carthusian order (1030–1101), who was born in Cologne. See also Brun .

variants.name: Brunel
meanings: French: diminutive of   Brun   ‘brown’. Compare   Brunelle  .
History: Jacques Brunel from Dieppe in Seine-Maritime, France, married Suzanne Bertault in Boucherville, QC, in 1677.

variants.name: Lebrun
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Fernand, Normand, Andre, Emile, Herve, Lucien, Michel, Yves, Adelard, Dominique, Edouard.
French and Walloon: variant of Brun ‘brown’, with fused masculine definite article le.

nameMeanings.name: Juliane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieann
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

variants.name: Julieanne
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anne  , perhaps sometimes regarded as a feminine form of   Julian .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliane Brun was born in 1185, in Fylingdales, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Brun, was 24 and her mother, Lady Isabell Le Bruen, was 19. She married Henry le Scrope about 1213, in Fylingdales, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1223, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliane Brun est née en 1185, à Fylingdales, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Brun, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabell Le Bruen, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Henry le Scrope environ 1213, à Fylingdales, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1223, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Wensley, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, UK: Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Juliane Brun 1185 in Fylingdales, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Brun 24 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabell Le Bruen 19. Sie hat um 1213 in Fylingdales, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Henry le Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1223 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane Brun è nata il nel 1185 nel Fylingdales, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Brun, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabell Le Bruen, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Henry le Scrope circa 1213, nel Fylingdales, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1223, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Wensley, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, UK: イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウエンスリー
ja.lifeSummary: Juliane Brunが1185年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフイリングダレスで生まれた時，父Roger Brunは24歳，母Lady Isabell Le Bruenは19歳であった。約1213年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアフイリングダレスでHenry le Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1223年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアウエンスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliane Brun(이)가 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 피링다일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Brun(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabell Le Bruen(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 피링다일스에서 Henry le Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1223년 영국 요르크실르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 웬슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, UK: Wensley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliane Brun nasceu em 1185, em Fylingdales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Brun, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabell Le Bruen, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry le Scrope aproximadamente 1213, em Fylingdales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1223, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Wensley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Wensley, North Yorkshire, England, UK: Wensley, North Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliane Brun родилась в 1185 г. в местности филингдеилесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Brun было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabell Le Bruen, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry le Scrope около 1213 г. в местности филингдеилесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1223 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности венсли, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliane Brun nació en 1185, en Fylingdales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Brun, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Isabell Le Bruen, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Henry le Scrope aproximadamente 1213, en Fylingdales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1223, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Wensley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
